overall.description: A third-person perspective game scene showing a character trekking through a blizzard-swept snowy mountain landscape. The camera follows the character as they navigate deep snow and approach massive rock formations in near-whiteout conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain ridge in blizzard conditions

events.description: character shadow becomes visible on the snow as the camera follows from behind

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow along an exposed mountain ridge with poor visibility

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered mountain terrain stretching into the blizzard
large gray rock formation emerging from the snow on the right side
snow-covered mountain ridge visible through the falling snow in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain ridge during a heavy blizzard. The camera follows the character from a third-person perspective as they walk forward through deep snow. A rock outcrop is visible on the right, and distant ridges loom through the whiteout conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching a massive rock monolith in heavy snow

events.description: tall rock monolith becomes visible ahead through the blizzard
camera moves closer to the monolith, revealing its scale and textured surface

agents.ego_description: approaching and navigating around a massive rock pillar while battling the blizzard winds

entered.detail: massive vertical rock pillar with weathered gray surface rising prominently from the snow

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive rock monolith that dominates the view through the blizzard. The camera moves closer to the towering formation, revealing its cracked texture and scale. The snow field transitions from distant to immediate as the character navigates toward the rock structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliff edge path beside vertical rock face

events.description: passing the monolith and entering a narrow path along the cliff edge
continuing along the cliff edge with the rock face on the left and open drop on the right

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along a narrow cliff edge with the vertical rock wall on the left side

entered.detail: steep vertical rock wall with cracked texture running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the monolith, the character now traverses a narrow cliff edge with a vertical rock face on the left and an open drop visible to the right. The snow field extends into the distance as the path winds along the mountain's edge, with the blizzard continuing to reduce visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a blizzard-swept mountain ridge that transitions from an open snowy expanse to a precarious cliffside path. It begins by following a character trekking through deep snow on a wide ridge, where distant peaks are barely visible through the heavy whiteout. As the character advances, the view is dominated by a massive, cracked rock monolith that the camera approaches to reveal its towering scale. The scene then shifts as the character passes the monolith and moves onto a narrow cliff edge, with a vertical rock face on the left and a steep drop to the right. Finally, the path winds along the mountain's edge, extending toward a distant, snow-covered horizon while the blizzard continues to obscure the landscape.
